title: India Credit Risk Intelligence — Scored Borrower Dataset

data.description: Scored borrower dataset with predicted default probability, risk bands, and business-derived columns. Generated by XGBoost Model B (AUC=0.8994). Ready for Power BI / Tableau.
data.name: credit_risk_powerbi_input.csv

columns.name: predicted_pd
columns.description: Predicted probability of default (0-1). XGBoost Model B, AUC=0.8994.

columns.name: risk_band
columns.description: Risk category: Low Risk (<25% PD), Medium Risk (25-50%), High Risk (>50%)

columns.name: approved_flag
columns.description: 1 if predicted_pd < 0.50 (approved under Model B policy), 0 if rejected

columns.name: rejected_flag
columns.description: 1 if predicted_pd >= 0.50 (rejected under Model B policy)

columns.name: ead_proxy
columns.description: Exposure at Default proxy = 12 x monthly income (INR)

columns.name: lgd_assumption
columns.description: Loss Given Default = 0.45 (45%, industry standard for unsecured Indian loans)

columns.name: expected_loss
columns.description: Expected Loss = predicted_pd x LGD x EAD (INR)

columns.name: risk_rank
columns.description: Portfolio rank by predicted PD (1 = most risky)

columns.name: loss_rank
columns.description: Portfolio rank by expected loss (1 = largest expected loss)

columns.name: enq_L6m
columns.description: Credit enquiries in last 6 months — #1 SHAP feature
